title: secretx/src/lib.rs dispatch table (from_uri, from_signing_uri) has no CI unit tests
description: All integration tests call backend constructors directly (e.g. AwsSmBackend::from_uri). The from_uri dispatch table in secretx/src/lib.rs is never exercised by any test. A regression in the dispatch — wrong backend name, wrong feature guard, wrong error message for disabled backend — would not be caught by CI. Add unit tests in secretx/src/lib.rs testing: correct dispatch, InvalidUri on unknown backend, and correct error message when a feature is disabled.
